text.title: Workspace Snapshot Link + Closes-N Enforcement
text.summary: Every agent-opened PR carries a Workspace snapshot URL and a tracker-closing keyword in the PR body, both verified by a CI check that fails the PR if either is missing.

section.title: PR body contract
section.p: The PR body is the only place where reviewers and the tracker both see the agent's chain-of-thought. A missing snapshot link forces reviewers back into the diff; a missing `Closes #N` keyword leaves the issue open after merge.

rule.statement: Every agent-opened PR MUST include in its body (a) a single line matching `^(Closes|Fixes) #[0-9]+` referencing the source issue, and (b) a Workspace snapshot URL on the line `Workspace snapshot: https://github.com/copilot/spaces/`. A repository CI check MUST grep both lines and fail the PR if either is missing. Editing the PR body to remove either line MUST re-trigger the failing check, blocking merge until restored. The agent MUST NOT edit the snapshot URL after open; if the spec or plan changes, it opens a fresh PR.
rule.rationale: April 2026 saw a documented GitHub bug where Copilot agent stripped the link text from the PR body; the closing keyword's absence left issues open across an entire org. Making both lines required and CI-enforced is the only way to guarantee the round-trip given that any tooling can mutate the body. Snapshot URL stability matters because reviewers cite it in their review comments — overwriting it invalidates that audit trail.

example.code:
Closes #4421
## Summary Reject empty `items` on `POST /api/orders` with 422.
## Workspace snapshot Workspace snapshot: https://github.com/copilot/spaces/abc123
example.note: Closing keyword on its own line, snapshot URL preserved, regex passes.

example.code: ## Summary Reject empty items on POST /api/orders. fixes the bug from issue 4421
example.note: "fixes the bug from issue 4421" does not match `^(Closes|Fixes) #[0-9]+`; merge leaves the issue open. No snapshot URL — reviewer cannot read the spec/plan.

antipattern.description: Snapshot URL placed inside an HTML comment so it does not render.
antipattern.reason: Reviewers cannot click it; the audit trail is technically present but unusable, defeating the purpose of mandating the link.

section.reference: PR body template with both required lines.
GitHub discussion of the Copilot agent strip-the-link bug.
